summary: Frontend-only e2e UI smoke test for the static 'Cama del Camino' React + Tailwind prototype. All 10 features from the review request verified on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844) viewports via Playwright against the public preview URL. Zero console errors, zero pageerrors. UI strictly matches palette (blue #2563eb, slate grays, white), uses lucide-react icons (no emojis), prices in €, neutral placeholder image blocks (no real images), no network calls on any interactive mock.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is clean, small, and well-structured. Files all < 110 lines. No DRY violations.
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes as required.
Mock handlers in App.jsx correctly avoid network calls and setTimeout per brief.
Footer link group 'Albergues' has only 3 items vs Producto/Empresa (4 items); this is a content choice — matches mock data, no bug.

Brief forbids agent-generated tests inside the prototype repo; no test files were added under /app/frontend. Playwright tests were run in-memory only via browser automation, nothing persisted in the repo.
seed_data_creation: None. All data already mocked in /app/frontend/src/data/{routes,hostels}.js as required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static prototype only — no backend, no auth, no real reservations. Mock handlers: search submit updates lastSearch state (renders sr-only [data-testid=search-debug] node), route card click smooth-scrolls to #search, CTA join button smooth-scrolls to #help (footer). 'Ver albergue' buttons are intentional no-ops. Stats testids use kebab-case from label whitespace (e.g. stat-etapas-cubiertas). Sticky header confirmed (y=0 after scroll). Mobile hamburger toggles [data-testid=mobile-menu] mount/unmount (not a CSS hide).
verified_flows: Sticky header + 4 nav items (Buscar albergue, Rutas, Soy albergue, Ayuda) + logo 'Cama del Camino'
Hero title 'Reserva tu albergue en el Camino de Santiago' + subtitle 'Sin comisiones abusivas. Directamente con el albergue.'
Search form with 4 fields; typing + submitting does not crash; lastSearch debug node renders
4 route cards (frances, portugues, norte, primitivo); clicking one smooth-scrolls back to #search (1594 -> 65)
3 hostel cards (h-001, h-002, h-003) with €-prefixed prices and tags badges; neutral gray placeholder blocks (no real images)
CTA dark slate panel with correct title and 'Publicar mi albergue' button that scrolls towards footer
Footer with logo, 3 link groups (Producto, Albergues, Empresa), copyright line
Mobile 390px: hamburger opens/closes mobile-menu; layout responsive
